assessment_goal: Transparent maturity audit, not a promotional score. Scores characterise the v0.2.0-analysis plain_fsm/shallow-oracle slice only.

limitations: No sealed held-out evaluation split or perennial leaderboard host is bundled.
Container image and independent replication vignette remain roadmap items.
literature_alignment: ACM artifact evaluation badging: strong available/functional static package.
SV-COMP / JAPEX-style perennial tracks: not yet realised.
strengths: 329 manuscript exports tracked with SHA-256 digests and campaign manifests.
ACM-style artifact package includes verification report and reproducibility instructions.

limitations: Only plain_fsm instances are realised (machine-type coverage 12.5%).
Mean dimension value coverage is 54.8%; triple-feature coverage is 10.0%.
The declared ten-dimensional stratification plan remains partially populated.
literature_alignment: Siegmund et al. / Borg et al. diversity criterion: partial feature-space coverage.
Jimenez et al. representativeness: synthetic single-family slice, not multi-domain.
strengths: Four balanced complexity tiers and near-uniform operator quotas on the realised cohort.
Seventeen of nineteen mutation operators appear with documented build-failure exclusions.

limitations: Only three deterministic engines plus one random control are evaluated.
Operator-level rank stability is low on the detectable-only partition (Kendall tau ~ 0.11).
Cohort-wide discrimination is inflated by 505/1,000 oracle-saturated cases.
literature_alignment: Gazzola et al.\ APR survey utility criterion: strong baseline separation, limited method diversity.
Just et al.\ Defects4J practice: paired per-case disagreement and effect sizes are implemented.
strengths: All three deterministic C1 baselines are statistically distinguishable on detectable-only repair.
Large Cohen's h effect sizes separate missing-transition from random controls.

limitations: 119 detectable faults lack transition-localizable ground truth.
Default shallow-oracle spectra yield weak top-1 guidance (19.68% on localizable GT).
literature_alignment: Kanewala \& Bieman testing-benchmark criterion: evaluation hook present, ground truth partial.
Code-centric FL benchmarks (e.g.\ Defects4J line faults): richer GT coverage and stronger default spectra.
strengths: Transition-level Ochiai hook, localizability audit export, and dual-partition reporting exist.
Primary headline metrics use a construct-valid 376-case localizable subset.

limitations: Only single-pass deterministic engines are characterised; search/LLM repair tracks are absent.
505/1,000 oracle-saturated faults confound cohort-wide repair numerators.
No community tool submission workflow or held-out repair split is published.
literature_alignment: Jimenez et al.\ SBSE benchmark task support: baseline repair lane exists, advanced techniques unevaluated.
Defects4J repair track maturity: fewer tools, narrower fault model, but mature community adoption.
strengths: Deterministic C1 baselines, detectable-only leaderboard columns, and regression tracking are shipped.
Per-case exports support paired statistical comparison following APR benchmark practice.

limitations: No fully pinned container image or hardware digest is reported in the manuscript.
Independent third-party replication runs are not yet published.
Tooling GitHub tag and empirical Zenodo deposit use separate release labels.
literature_alignment: Fucci et al. / Hook & Kelly replication packaging: strong static artefacts, weak independent replay.
ACM artifact evaluation checklist: available, verified exports; execution pinning incomplete.
strengths: Frozen Zenodo deposit, pinned cohort manifests, and checksum-backed manuscript exports.
Canonical CLI regeneration path documented in CANONICAL_REPRODUCTION.md.

literature_comparison.fsmrepairbench_v0_2: Single plain_fsm family; 54.8% mean dimension coverage
literature_comparison.source: Siegmund et al. (2015); Borg et al. (2017)
literature_comparison.typical_mature_benchmark: Multi-project or multi-family strata with audited coverage gaps

literature_comparison.fsmrepairbench_v0_2: Zenodo deposit, verified exports, CLI docs; no container vignette
literature_comparison.typical_mature_benchmark: Frozen artefacts + scripted replay + independent replication

literature_comparison.fsmrepairbench_v0_2: Three deterministic baselines separable on detectable-only repair
literature_comparison.source: Gazzola et al. (2019); Just et al. (2014)
literature_comparison.typical_mature_benchmark: Multiple techniques separable with stable rankings

literature_comparison.fsmrepairbench_v0_2: 376/1,000 localizable GT; weak default top-1 under shallow oracles
literature_comparison.typical_mature_benchmark: Broad, construct-valid ground truth and informative spectra

literature_comparison.fsmrepairbench_v0_2: Deterministic C1 lane only; saturation confounds cohort-wide repair
literature_comparison.typical_mature_benchmark: Multiple repair approaches with community submission path

literature_comparison.fsmrepairbench_v0_2: 107 verified CSV/PNG/TeX exports; no held-out community track
literature_comparison.typical_mature_benchmark: Verified bundle, perennial tracks, held-out splits

priority_gaps.gap: Only plain_fsm instances are realised (machine-type coverage 12.5%).
119 detectable faults lack transition-localizable ground truth.
Only single-pass deterministic engines are characterised; search/LLM repair tracks are absent.
Only three deterministic engines plus one random control are evaluated.
No fully pinned container image or hardware digest is reported in the manuscript.
